if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND a.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND a.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpArea :: selectById */ a.* , ui.ui_nm AS ui_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM dp_area a LEFT JOIN dp_ui ui ON ui.ui_id = a.ui_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = a.site_id WHERE a.area_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpArea :: selectList */ a.* , ui.ui_nm AS ui_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM dp_area a LEFT JOIN dp_ui ui ON ui.ui_id = a.ui_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = a.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpArea :: selectPageList */ a.* , ui.ui_nm AS ui_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM dp_area a LEFT JOIN dp_ui ui ON ui.ui_id = a.ui_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = a.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(a.*) /* base.ec.dp :: DpArea :: selectPageCount */ FROM dp_area a
